summary: REQ-22 (production deployment + verified frontend↔backend connectivity in production) is not evidenced in the diff, and REQ-23 is implemented incorrectly: LIVE_URL.md is not at repo root and contains a placeholder URL rather than a real production URL. The diff also introduces multiple unrequested/at-risk changes (notably backend data model/logic changes and extra documentation/feature claims) that go beyond “make current app live.”

missing_requirements.requirement: Trigger a production deployment so the current app is live (production) and confirm the production frontend can reach the production backend without connectivity errors; verify create/save Daily Entry and view it in History/Record Details on production.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff only shows code and UI changes; there is no evidence of an actual production deployment being triggered/completed, nor any production connectivity verification or production URL/canister configuration proof. Acceptance criteria about successful production deployment and end-to-end production behavior are not verifiable from the provided changes.
evidence: file-diff summary shows only source changes; no deploy artifacts/commands/logs/CI changes included

missing_requirements.requirement: Provide the live (production) app URL for the deployed frontend in a repo file named LIVE_URL.md at the repository root, containing the full production https:// URL end-users should open.
missing_requirements.reason: LIVE_URL.md was added under frontend/ (not repository root), and the URL inside is a placeholder ("https://your-canister-id.icp0.io") rather than a real deployed production URL.
evidence: frontend/LIVE_URL.md (added at frontend/ not repo root)

hallucinated_features.description: Added end-user usage instructions, feature checklist, and support guidance in LIVE_URL.md (including claims like CSV export, retry button, Google Drive/Sheets wording, and caffeine.ai attribution).
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-23 only asks for a root-level LIVE_URL.md containing the live production URL; the additional marketing/support/feature-claim content is not requested and risks being inaccurate (especially with a placeholder URL).

hallucinated_features.description: Introduced new frontend diagnostics/error UX (BackendConnectionErrorCard, useActorDiagnostics) and rewired multiple pages to use it.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest is focused on production deployment + providing the live link; while connectivity fixes may be related, these specific new UI components and hooks are not explicitly requested and may be considered additional feature work beyond the deployment/link tasks.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend changes that appear to alter/expand backend domain logic and data structures (e.g., DailyRecord with meals/timestamp, category APIs like getCategoriesByType, and ingredient/category lists edits).
hallucinated_features.reason: Non-goals/constraints state not to change ingredient lists, record formats, or add new product features unless required to resolve a deployment/production connectivity blocker. The diff shows substantial backend logic/data changes without clear evidence they are strictly required for production deployment connectivity.

hallucinated_features.description: Changed global styling/theme configuration (index.css, tailwind config) and other frontend assets/config per summaries.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly lists UI/layout changes as non-goals unless required to resolve a deployment/production connectivity blocker; the diff summary indicates multiple styling/theme/config adjustments that are not directly requested in REQ-22/REQ-23.
